shortInline.notes: Short bounded coding-adjacent asks may stay inline when no durable lane is needed.

ackThenInline.notes: Small multi-step asks may stay inline after a quick acknowledgement if they do not require a durable execution lane.

durableLaneRequirements: resume-safe checkpoint or concrete on-disk task state
one visible acknowledgement after lane establishment
failClosedWhen: worktree cannot be established or verified
resume target is missing or inconsistent

inboundDeadlineGuard.forcedAckMessage: Still working; continuing in a durable lane and will report the next meaningful checkpoint.
rules: Do not start long commands from an inbound Discord worker unless remaining budget is safely above threshold and the command is bounded.
If a long phase is requested after acknowledgement, require a durable lane before execution.
If the remaining budget falls below threshold, release the inbound worker with a visible checkpoint instead of polling.
